wares.name: Pixel Art
wares.description: A fully featured pixel art editor with pencil, fill, eyedropper, undo/redo, colour palette, and PNG export. Draw pixel art right inside WordPress.
wares.author: Bazaar

wares.name: Invoice Generator
wares.description: Create professional invoices, manage clients, track payment status (Draft → Sent → Paid → Overdue), and export PDFs — entirely within WordPress.
wares.author: Bazaar

wares.name: Focus Timer
wares.description: A beautiful Pomodoro focus timer with ambient sound mixer (rain, brown noise, white noise), session task list, and a GitHub-style session history heatmap.
wares.author: Bazaar

wares.name: Kanban Board
wares.description: A drag-and-drop Kanban board with customisable columns, card labels, due dates, and local persistence. Replace Trello for simple projects — no server needed.
wares.author: Bazaar

wares.name: Color Palette Studio
wares.description: Create and save colour palettes with a full HSL editor, harmony generator (complementary, triadic, analogous), WCAG contrast checker, and one-click export to CSS, Tailwind, or SVG.
wares.author: Bazaar

wares.name: Retro Synthesizer
wares.description: A fully functional synthesizer — 4 waveforms, ADSR envelope, low-pass filter with resonance, rotary knobs, and a 16-step sequencer. Built on the Web Audio API. Zero runtime dependencies.
wares.author: Bazaar
